_reason: No verified English-medium, India-relevant program in the required course taxonomy (mbbs, medical-pg, bsc-nursing, pharmacy, bds). UW/H's Medicine (Staatsexamen) programme is German-medium requiring CEFR C1 German; there is no undergraduate BSc Nursing, Pharmacy, BDS, or Medical PG track. Only confirmed English-taught bachelor's is Management (non-medical, out of scope). See companion .md for full sourcing and rationale.

bestFitFor: Not applicable — no verified English-medium MBBS/BDS/Pharmacy/BSc-Nursing/Medical-PG program exists at this institution for India-audience publication under this pipeline's taxonomy.

draftContent._note: Narrative fields intentionally left unwritten. UW/H's health-faculty programs (Medicine Staatsexamen) are German-medium (CEFR C1 required) and there is no undergraduate BSc Nursing, Pharmacy, BDS, or Medical PG track suitable for this pipeline's India-facing course taxonomy. Writing full marketing narrative content would misrepresent language of instruction and program availability. See witten-herdecke-university.md for corroborated facts gathered (city, founding, faculties, housing, international support) that could seed a future non-medical (e.g. Management) listing if the codebase adds that scope.
